owning_subsystem: repository git workflow, workspace stabilization, branch integration, and repo-owned validation
allowed_touchpoints: any repository paths touched by the merged branches and required stabilization fixes
non_goals: Do not bypass branch protection or review policy.
Do not preserve stale branch tips when a documented superseding reconciliation is safer.
Do not discard legitimate work without explicit audit notes in the issue and execution artifacts.
scope_in: Commit and validate the current refactor/136-rust-build-hygiene-tracing-baseline working tree.
Create an integration branch from origin/main and carry the issue-linked execution artifact bundle there.
Reconcile feature/125-surrealdb-data-plane-delegation only through a curated additive follow-up commit if it still contains behavior missing from the integrated tree.
Stabilize the resulting branch until the repo-level and UI-level validation gates pass.
Archive and prune already-landed, derivative, and superseded branches after main reflects the integrated state.
scope_out: Unrelated product changes outside the identified branch consolidation set.
Promoting stale stash-only note or report artifacts into main.
Long-lived placeholder behavior beyond narrow temporary stabilization stubs.
target_paths: workspace paths changed by the merged branches
acceptance_criteria: The integration branch exists and carries the issue-linked task contract and execution plan.
refactor/136 is committed and validated before it is merged into the consolidation branch.
Legitimate remaining work from 129, 131, 121, and 136 is integrated into one validated branch.
feature/125 is either reconciled through one curated additive commit or explicitly documented as superseded.
cargo fmt --all --check, cargo verify-repo, cargo xtask verify profile ui, and cargo xtask ui-hardening pass on the final integration result.
Archive tags exist for every pruned branch that is not merged directly.
Already-landed, derivative, and merged branches are pruned only after main contains the validated result.
validation_artifacts: Passing focused branch merge validation output
Passing final repo and UI gate output
Issue comment summarizing discarded stash-only note artifacts
rollback_path: Keep the integration branch and archive tags until main reflects the validated result, so the branch merges or reconciliation commits can be reverted together if needed.
